description: Golden set of small, representative build tasks for harness regression testing. Each task is built fresh and run through the same independent objective gate the real factory uses; a task passes only if the gate is clean and all acceptance criteria are met.

tasks.prompt: Single-file index.html tip calculator: bill amount, tip % presets plus custom, party size, live tip/total/per-person.
Single-page in-memory todo list: add, complete (toggle), delete, and filter all/active/done.
Markdown preview: textarea on the left, live-rendered HTML on the right.
Countdown timer: input seconds, start/pause/reset, shows mm:ss, alerts at zero.

regression.note: All golden tasks must pass; a drop below threshold fails the gate.
